title: Throwable Toasts
description: A mod that lets you throw away those pesky toasts!
body:
Throw away those pesky toasts by dragging them and flicking them to the side!

A fork of the [original](https://modrinth.com/mod/throwable-toasts) to port to newer versions

![yeeeeeet](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/03875933-7658-45d2-8fad-12234d45aeaa)
